rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(31, 41, 55), rgb(196, 204, 216));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 594px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 40px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 合同审批平台 — 系统架构
